prompt: A narrow dirt path through an open meadow that winds in an extremely tortuous, overcomplicated route zigzagging obsessively around every tiny pebble, puddle, and blade of grass, while a clear straight path between the same two points is obviously visible nearby. The winding path is worn deep into the ground from repeated exact use. Golden hour lighting, photorealistic, shot from slightly above. No text, no labels, no signs, no diagrams.
metaphor: The obsessively winding path memorizes every tiny obstacle perfectly but fails to generalize, while the straight path shows the simpler solution that actually works.
